subject: [DOC] Explain where to download kubectl
commit_message:
[DOC] Explain where to download kubectl

Some people weren't sure on which machine we have to install it.

Issue-ID: OOM-2061
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: Ib46ac2211a716e04ce5b8d9394264bb7fd34a42c

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 1 on the queue.

Patch Set 1:

Gitlab Orange 3: Chained-CI build started, max time: 14400 seconds
